languages.text: {n}Женская фигура чуть заметно вздрагивает и бросает взгляд на второго Старейшину.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die weibliche Figur zuckt leicht zusammen und wirft einen Blick auf den anderen Ältesten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La silhouette féminine tressaille légèrement et jette un coup d'œil à l'autre aîné.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女性身影微微抽动了一下，并向另一位长老看了一眼。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La figura femenina se estremece ligeramente y lanza una mirada al otro Anciano.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その女性はわずかに身動きし、もう一人の長老を一瞥した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kadın figürü hafifçe seğirir ve diğer Yaşlı'ya bir bakış atar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The female figure twitches slightly and shoots a glance at the other Elder.{/n}
